subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1915-05-15
subcodes.first_line: The Cause of God is in need of many active, efficient workers and the time is soon coming... As thou knowest it is very easy for us to teach and spread the Cause in this country but the government will rise immediately against us and the Blessed Tombs of Baha'u'llah and the Bab will be demolished by the hands of a fanatical mob
subcodes.subjects: @future of Haifa; of the Holy Land, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause
